summary: reservations list now no-ops before any live MasterPark verifyLogin/listReservations calls under PRINTING_PRESS_VERIFY, and locations.php parsing now handles escaped apostrophes inside single-quoted JavaScript strings.
reason: Greptile identified that reservations list was the remaining network-touching command without an IsVerifyEnv guard and that normalizeJSObject emitted invalid JSON for JS-only escaped apostrophes such as \' in single-quoted strings.
validated_outcome: Focused tests cover reservations list under PRINTING_PRESS_VERIFY=1 with zero AJAX calls and location parsing for single-quoted names containing escaped apostrophes.
